title: append VEX function
summary: Adds an item to an array or string.

title: argsort VEX function
summary: Returns the indices of a sorted version of an array.

title: attribclass VEX function
summary: Returns the class of a geometry attribute.

title: cross VEX function
summary: Returns the cross product between the two vectors.

title: findlowerboundsorted VEX function
summary: Finds the largest item smaller than a target value in a sorted array.

title: insert VEX function
summary: Inserts an item, array, or string into an array or string.

title: windingnumber VEX function
summary: Computes the winding number of a mesh around a point.
